# PHIL.025 ? Zen Buddhism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** zen_buddhism
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Direct insight beyond words; meditation (zazen); koans; sudden enlightenment; present moment awareness; non-dualism

## Application
Look beyond conceptual thinking; value direct experience; be fully present; see paradoxes as pointing beyond logic; practice mindfulness

## Key Values
- Direct insight
- Present awareness
- Non-conceptual wisdom
- Meditation

## Tags
philosophy, eastern-philosophy, zen-buddhism
